title: KAIRO
description: AI-powered Personal Knowledge Management (PKM) desktop application to upload study materials, generate summaries, knowledge graphs, flashcards and quizzes. Built in AI assistant to guide users on their study materials. Adapts to user's topic mastery level and proficiency to provide targeted learning routes. Gamification and levelling system to encourage consistent learning.

title: LORE
description: Desktop writing app that allows avid writers to develop story plots, organise chapters, scenes and versions, build character profiles, and generate story outlines. Read mode for a clean and immersive reading experience.

title: VEN'S ATELIER
description: Personal portfolio website to showcase my skills and projects. p.s. You're accessing it right now!

title: PRESSED.
description: Modern e-commerce vinyl store for collectors alike. Browse catalog, save to collection, rate, and purchase vinyl records through Stripe and view real-time order tracking. Admin dashboard to manage inventory through Discogs API, track orders and revenue statistics.

title: ESSENCE
description: AI assistant that provides contextual and factual information with citations. Responses are tailored based on user's custom preferences and instructions, enables chat memories for persistent conversations. Supports wide range of languages, e.g. Japanese, Korean, French, etc. Currently under occasional polishing.

title: SOLAR SYSTEM 3D
description: Interactive 3D visualisation of the solar system, featuring real orbital mechanics based on Kepler's equations, with detailed explanations of each planet. Utlised on rendering, camera controls, raycasting, and dynamic lighting.

title: STUDENT FEEDBACK & SUGGESTION SYSTEM
description: AI-powered feedback and suggestion system for UMSKAL students with sentiment analysis.

title: BLACK HOLE RAY-TRACING SIMULATION
description: Visualises gravitational lensing, accretion disk, and spacetime curvature using ray-tracing techniques. GPU-accelerated computations with shaders to solve geodesic equations and render 2D and 3D view of light paths.

title: NOWHERE
description: Web-based game for players to guess real-world locations using Google Maps and Street View imagery. Players gain XP and Score for guesses based on accuracy.

title: FERRY TERMINAL MANAGEMENT
description: Console-based ferry terminal system for managing ferry operations (passenger and vehicle management, ticketing, scheduling) with data structure and algorithms.

title: SNACK ATLAS
description: E-commerce snack shop for customers to browse and purchase snacks with order tracking. Admin panel for managing products and orders.

title: PROGRESS PACER
description: Group project | Academic management tool for students to track academic performance with personalised feedback, with task management, grade calculation, and progress visualization.

title: LIMBO
description: Personal website for showcasing interactive 3D environments with user-controlled character movements.

title: ONLINE GROCERY SYSTEM
description: GUI-based grocery system for purchasing goods with checkout functionalities and grocery receipt as order confirmation.

title: ESPRESSO EMPORIUM
description: French language themed café website with an emphasis on frontend design and user-centricity.

title: FOOD ODYSSEY
description: Foundation level FYP project showcasing various culinary delights globally (Asia, Europe, Africa, Middle East, North & South America), with 360° interactive panorama environment view.
